bull.b: Two successful pivotal Phase 3 readouts materially improve the probability of regulatory approval and create a clearer commercial pathway for elegrobart/veligrotug. This strengthens long-term market position in thyroid eye disease, enables planning for launch infrastructure, and justifies near-term commercial investmen

A multi-year commercial manufacturing agreement with WuXi reduces scale-up and supply risk ahead of potential approval. Non-exclusive terms and rolling forecasts preserve flexibility while fixed service fees through 2026 and quality/regulatory clauses support dependable commercial supply and margin planning.

bull.t: Relatively Strong Balance Sheet / Low Leverage
bull.b: Low leverage provides financial flexibility to fund late-stage commercialization and R&D without onerous interest burdens. A strong capital base reduces near-term default risk, supports partner negotiations, and improves ability to absorb operational setbacks while pursuing launches and label expansions.

bear.b: Sustained negative operating and free cash flow at this scale requires frequent external financing until commercial revenues ramp. Persistent burn constrains strategic optionality, forces prioritization of programs, and raises long-term dilution or liquidity risk if approvals or launches are delayed.

bear.t: Large Recurring Net Losses And Weak Profitability
bear.b: Deep operating losses and negative margins mean the company is far from self-sustaining through product sales. Until meaningful commercial revenue replaces R&D and SG&A spending, returns on equity will remain negative and investor patience or access to low-cost capital could be tested.

bear.t: Reliance On Financing With Dilution Risk
bear.b: Material capital raises (convertible notes plus equity) alleviate near-term funding needs but create dilution and potential cash settlement obligations. Continued reliance on issuance until product revenues grow may dilute shareholders and complicate capital structure, affecting long-term EPS and investor returns.
